---
title: "About"
image: profile.jpg
about:
  template: jolla
  links:
    - icon: twitter
      text: Twitter
      href: https://x.com/BugrainDeep
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/bugra-akkus/
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/BugraAKKUS
    - icon: youtube
      text: YouTube
      href: https://www.youtube.com/@BugraInDeep
---

I have a wide curiosity across many different fields — I love exploring, learning, and sharing what I find. Outside of that, I'm passionate about fitness and running.

I run two YouTube channels: one where I share vlogs in my native language, and another — **Bugra in Deep** — where I turn the things I've learned about machine learning, deep learning, and statistics into videos. I also try to guide people on where and how to learn these topics.

This blog is an extension of that. Here I write about papers I've read, concepts I've found interesting, and ideas worth sharing. Whether you're on a data science journey or simply curious about statistics, deep learning, or machine learning — I hope you find something useful here.
